ground_truth: Ajax defeated Bayern Munich 2-1 at the Johan Cruyff Arena in Amsterdam on April 8, 2025, in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final. Goals from Brian Brobbey and Devyne Rensch secured the win, with Harry Kane scoring a late consolation for Bayern. The second leg is scheduled for April 15 at the Allianz Arena in Munich.
summary: Ajax defeated Bayern Munich 2–1 at the Johan Cruyff Arena in the first leg of the Champions League quarter-finals. Brian Brobbey and Devyne Rensch scored for Ajax, while Harry Kane scored for Bayern in injury time. The result gives Ajax a valuable away goal advantage heading to the second leg in Munich. Ajax's last appearance in the semi-finals was in 2019.
